title: SkillManifest

id.description: Stable URN identifying this skill manifest (urn:srcos:skill:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

name.description: Short programmatic name of the skill (e.g., 'code-reviewer').

version.description: Semantic version of this skill manifest.

entryDoc.description: Path or URN of the primary instruction document that defines this skill's behaviour.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this skill does.

activationRules.description: Conditions under which this skill should be automatically selected.

requires.description: Tool, permission, and environment requirements the skill depends on.

executionSurfaceRef.description: Optional URN of an ExecutionSurface that overrides defaults for this skill.

policyBindings.description: URNs of PolicyBindings that govern execution of this skill.

artifactOutputs.description: Names or path patterns of artifacts this skill is expected to produce.

reviewMode.description: When true, the skill operates in read-only review mode.

allowShellExecution.description: Whether this skill is permitted to run shell commands.

protectedPaths.description: Filesystem paths this skill must not read or modify.

description: A machine-readable descriptor for an agent skill or reusable capability, specifying its activation rules, tool and permission requirements, policy bindings, execution surface constraints, and expected artifact outputs.
